title: BackgroundDataFile
description: Collection of SRD character backgrounds with mechanical fields.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this data file.

description.description: Short flavour description of the background.

skillProficiencies.description: Skill proficiency IDs granted by this background.

toolProficiencies.description: Tool proficiency IDs granted by this background.

languageCount.description: Number of additional languages the character may learn.

startingEquipmentIds.description: Item IDs included in this background's starting equipment.

startingGold.description: Starting gold pieces granted by this background.

featureId.description: Feat ID for the background's special feature.

source.description: Ruleset source for this background entry.
